articles.excerpt: Space analytics firm HawkEye 360 raised $416 million in its U.S. IPO after pricing shares at $26 each, the top end of its target range, valuing the company at around $2.42 billion. The strong debut highlights rising investor appetite for defense and space-tec…

articles.title: Thalapathi Vijay's Chief Minister's oath has been postponed indefinitely due to the controversy that arose from him contesting elections from two places.

articles.title: Australia to force gas giants to reserve fuel for domestic use
